title: 100+ tokenized funds, equity, and credit have landed on Aptos via regulated UK/EU digital asset platform Archax
message_html: 100+ tokenized funds, equity, and credit have landed on Aptos via regulated UK/EU digital asset platform Archax ...
snippet: Aptos Labs (@AptosLabs): 100+ tokenized funds, equity, credit have landed on @Aptos via regulated UK/EU digital asset platform @ArchaxEx Aptos Labs dives in with Archax CEO @Grodfather: • Institutional-grade RWAs by BlackRock, Fidelity, Aberdeen • Expanding access to secure financial products onchai
